global.description: The ad features a bold red background with promotional text and a product display area.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale with free shipping on a product.

elements.label: Solid color background
elements.description: A vibrant red background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Product display area
elements.description: A rectangular area with a placeholder for a product image, featuring a simple outline.

elements.label: Three circular icons
elements.description: Three evenly spaced circular icons below the product display area, suggesting options or features.

elements.label: Left circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon positioned on the left side, part of the three circular icons.

elements.label: Right circular icon
elements.description: A small circular icon positioned on the right side, part of the three circular icons.

elements.label: Main promotional text
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Your next favorite pick' with a subtext 'Free shipping over $25' below it.
elements.text_content: Your next favorite pick Free shipping over $25

elements.label: Sale announcement
elements.description: Large, bold text at the top reading 'ThreadMark SALE' in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button at the bottom with the text 'Order now' in bold, inviting font.

elements.label: Product price
elements.description: A small text displaying the price '€9.99' in a clear, readable font.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, bold and vibrant, promoting a sale with free shipping.
embedding_texts.layout_text: The headline is at the top, the product display is centered, and the CTA is at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: Your next favorite pick, Free shipping over $25, ThreadMark SALE, Order now, €9.99
